memory:memory/2026-04-13.md:1:23.snippet: # 2026-04-13 ## Canva Integration Research - Jinay wants to create designs/templates programmatically that he can then edit in Canva - Canva Connect API is **insufficient** — can only autofill brand templates, not create or edit designs from scratch - **Canva Apps SDK** is the real solution — allows adding text, shapes, images, changing colors/positions/fonts, full programmatic design creation AND editing - But it's a Canva App (plugin), not a standalone API — runs inside Canva's editor - Requires building a mini app - **Third-party alternatives:** Templated.io ($49/mo), Bannerbear ($49/mo), ContentDrips ($29/mo) — design templates in their editor, generate via API - **Canva Enterprise*
